channel.title: Bridgeport Updates
channel.description: Updates for Bridgeport - local MCP connector host for macOS

item.title: Version 1.0.9
item.description:
Bridgeport 1.0.9

Adds automatic updates via Sparkle, and the project is now open source under GPL-3.0.

  • A Check for Updates… item in the menu bar menu, with automatic update checks.
  • Updates are EdDSA-signed and verified before extraction; the app remains Developer ID signed and notarized.
  • Bridge iconography from 1.0.8 is included for installs upgrading from 1.0.7 or earlier.
